meaning: adj.[生]间叶细胞的,由间叶细胞组成的,间叶细胞样的
examples: Mesenchymal stem cells can differentiate into bone, cartilage or fat cells.
Mesenchymal stem cells help repair damaged tissue and organs by renewing injured cells.
We have what are called mesenchymal stem cells. This type of stem cell goes on to become either fat or bone.
Osiris Therapeutics Inc. is enrolling patients in a phase II trial for Prochymal, which contains mesenchymal stem cells.
The researchers showed that it could be used to grow mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs), a kind of primitive cell derived from bone marrow that can be easily grown in culture.
